summary: Excellent matrix recording of a subtle 1977 show, highlighted by a soaring Playin' > Comes a Time > Playin' sequence and crystal‑clear Fire.
review: The set‑2 matrix capture is superb – crisp, balanced and free of any noticeable flaws. Musically the performance leans toward a more relaxed vibe than the famed 5/8/77 show, but still delivers standout moments like the fiery “Fire” and the beautifully executed Playin' > Comes a Time > Playin' closing suite. Jerry’s guitar work and vocals are praised throughout.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high praise for both sound quality (excellent matrix) and musical performance, with only mild critique of Fire’s intensity.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Superb, crystal‑clear mix; reviewers note no sound issues and describe it as “crisp”, “great sound” and “no complaints”.

show_quality.setlist_flow: A subtler, more relaxed approach than the high‑energy shows of May ’77, but still delivering strong jams and an exceptional Playin' > Comes a Time > Playin' closing sequence.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Repeatedly praised for his soaring solos, sweet strong vocals and overall performance.
